forecast.day_comments: A chance of rain and snow before 1pm, then a chance of rain.  Snow level 10300 feet. Partly sunny, with a high near 39. Windy, with a southwest wind 25 to 30 mph, with gusts as high as 45 mph.  Chance of precipitation is 40%. Little or no snow accumulation expected.
forecast.night_comments: Mostly cloudy, with a low around 31. Southwest wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph.
